payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_3b7db3fe943a4ec3b9d7247a', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "import csv\\nimport sys\\n\\ndef calculate_total_revenue(filename=\\"sales_data.csv\\"):\\n    try:\\n        total = 0.0\\n        with open(filename, \'r\') as f:\\n            reader = csv.DictReader(f)\\n            for row in reader:\\n                price = float(row[\'Price\'])\\n                quantity = int(row[\'Quantity\'])\\n                total += price * quantity\\n        print(f\\"Total Revenue: ${total:,.2f}\\")\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\n        print(f\\"Error: File \'{filename}\' not found.\\")\\n        sys.exit(1)\\n    except Exception as e:\\n        print(f\\"Error: {e}\\")\\n        sys.exit(1)\\n\\nif __name__ == \\"__main__\\":\\n    calculate_total_revenue()", "filename": "analyzer.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
